prestazioni: Engine: 1.8T (Engine Code: **AWP**) - Full forged internals build with **Manley 83mm forged crankshaft**, **JE 83mm forged pistons (8.5:1 compression)**, **Crower connecting rods**, and **ARP head studs** for 30psi boost capability. Paired with a **Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.86 A/R, 62mm compressor wheel)** on a **custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold** by **CTS Turbo**, supporting 400whp on **E85 fuel**.

Fuel System: **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump** with **Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors**, **Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger**, and **AEM 340lph in-tank pump** for E85 compatibility. **Precision Turbo 60mm wastegate** with **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** for precise boost control.

Drivetrain & Handling: **South Bend Stage 3 Clutch (6-puck disc)** with **Peloquin LSD** for the **02M 6-speed transmission**. **H&R RSS Club Sport coilovers (8kg/mm front, 7kg/mm rear springs)** with **Whiteline 24mm adjustable rear sway bar** and **SuperPro poly bushings (full kit)**. **Brembo GT 330mm 2-piece front rotors** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Bora widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with **APR carbon fiber splitter**, and **Voltex-style rear diffuser**) with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** and **blacked-out OEM badges**.

**OEM+ Euro-spec Bora GLI front end conversion** (clear-lens headlights, **Hella Dynamic Xenon projectors**, and **Lux H8 V4 LED fog lights**) with **Depo Racing JDM-style side markers**. **Carbon fiber hood (Seibon)** with **custom heat extractor vents** and **blacked-out grille**.

**Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +35 wheels** (ET35) with **Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (235/40/18)** and **custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear)** for aggressive flush fitment. **Custom rear valence with dual 3.5-inch exhaust tips (custom 304 stainless steel)** and **LED taillight conversion (VW Bora R32-style)** with **Smoked LED reverse lights**.
